items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for transactional vs marketing message separation.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement regarding the separation of transactional and marketing messages. However, the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm whether the system enforces this separation, particularly in the context of the linked use case. The lack of concrete API reads or persisted state checks to demonstrate compliance with this requirement leads to an inconclusive verdict.
